text: This monitor is absolutely beautiful. Crisp colors and high refresh rate.
Total waste of money. The HDMI port was broken on arrival.
Decent keyboard. Keys are a bit loud but typing feels good.
Terrible battery life. Lasts barely 2 hours under moderate load.
Amazing mouse! Very ergonomic and has great precision.
